route.name: ホーム
route.description: Bank home page with announcements and quick links to main services

route.name: 口座概要
route.description: Account overview showing current balance and recent transactions

route.name: 入金
route.description: Deposit money into your account — form with amount input

route.name: 出金
route.description: Withdraw money from your account — form with amount and destination

route.name: 取引履歴
route.description: Transaction history with filterable table showing all past transactions

page.summary: Japanese bank landing page. Shows bank name, welcome message, latest announcements, and quick action buttons for deposit, withdraw, and viewing transaction history. All text is in Japanese.
Account overview page. Displays current account balance in JPY, account number, and a list of recent transactions with date, description, and amount.
Deposit page. Contains a form with an amount field (in JPY) and a confirm button.
Withdrawal page. Contains a form with amount field (in JPY), destination account field, and a confirm button.
Transaction history page. Shows a table of all transactions with columns: date, type, description, and amount.
